text.title: Five days in Paris
text.u: Wow,
Paris.
[music]
So, we were supposed to fly to Paris
tonight, but it's a little snowy. Snow
kind of made the plans a little
difficult. Now, we're just venturing out
and we're going for dinner.
After a few calls with the airline, we
were finally able to rebook our flight
for the [music] next day. So, we set off
on the adventure. We had about a 2-hour
stop in Montreal and then [music] we
just got on our flight straight to
Paris.
Okay. How do you open this?
>> Oh, I opened it. Welcome. We're in
Paris. Welcome to my home. So, we have
all of our bags here.
Got some umbrellas because it's raining.
Look at this view.
Wow.
Paris. Next. Is this a bedroom?
Yes. Look at this bedroom. Oh my
goodness. Beautiful bed. Look at this
shower.
>> Oh, that's cool.
>> And this little nightstand. [music]
Okay, next up,
another bedroom. This is our parents
bedroom. Oh, mommy. Look at this
beautiful space.
Gorgina.
Wow. And then in the bathroom.
>> Wow. Gorge.
>> Okay, so we just arrived in Paris and I
am going to take a shower and then we're
going to go and get a coffee and walk
around. try not to go to sleep because
then I will be completely off of the
schedule. So, going to shower and we're
just going to like get out of the house
and start walking around. My sister and
I are obviously very tired. Neither of
us slept last night. I can't sleep on a
plane. My sister can't sleep on a plane.
It's how it goes. So, we're both
obviously very tired. It's like 8:00
a.m. in Toronto and I just like
essentially just pulled an all nighter.
But, we're just going to walk around for
a bit and explore and just like try and
stay awake. We're probably going to go
for dinner or something, but just like
go and explore. I really love Paris and
it's also just like so fun to be able to
use my French even though my French is
like kind of really bad and out of
practice, but I'm excited to be here and
you know, it's a bit rainy, but it's
such a cool city and so very excited to
explore. I'm just brushing out the
eyebrows right now. I'm using the
Glossier Boy Brow. I've been using this
a lot lately and I really honestly like
it quite a lot. It fills in my eyebrows
really nicely and subtly. But yeah, I'm
going to finish up doing my makeup. get
dressed and then we're going to head out
and go on a little adventure. I'm so
excited.
We're just venturing out right now into
the into the city.
[music]
>> [music]
>> Taste test. So, we're trying
Cafe New, which is like over there. Cafe
Paris.
It's good.
>> [music]
[bell]
>> Hello everyone. So, first monument of
the trip. We're at Noam.
Oh, this dog.
Hello.
>> Wow.
Come on.
[music]
Going to go to bed. I will see you all
tomorrow morning and good night.
Good morning everyone. It is
Wednesday [music]
and I just woke up. I'm having a little
bit of coffee that there's someone like
literally like drilling something
outside and it's so loud it woke me up
this morning. But I had a really good
sleep last night. I slept like all
through the night and I actually feel
like normal today instead of completely
delusional and exhausted. So that's
always a plus. So yeah.
[music]
[music]
All right, just got back from season.
So, I'll do a little haul of the things
that I got and then we're going to go
out for the rest of the day. Okay,
lovely people. Let me give you a haul. I
got this literal beautiful jacket. It's
such a fun little like spring jacket. I
feel even though it's like really cold
still in Toronto, I'm definitely going
to be able to wear this in the spring.
It's such a beautiful cut and I love it.
It's a little cropped trench. I [music]
think it's genuinely so cute. Love it.
And then the next thing I got is just
this like oversized button-up, which I'm
really excited about. But it's like it's
oversized, but it's like not too big.
And I feel like [music] it's really
cute. And I love how like the white is
kind of it's like off-white. It's not
just like stark white. Cute.
Cute. And you can like obviously
unbutton it, button it up. And I love
the sleeves. They're like longer. So
cute.
Then we were back out on the town. We
decided to go to this place [music] for
lunch. They had like mostly gluten-free
and like health food stuff, but it's
actually really good. And then we walked
around more. I love all of like the
little things that you see when you walk
out. Just like all of the stands with
the art, the bakeries, [music] just so
many cute little shops and everything.
Just walking around is literally the
best cuz you just get to see everything.
And then we went into Noam, which
[music] was also just so so beautiful.
Walked around even more and then headed
home.
Okay, I just got home. It was a very fun
day. It's currently 6:30 and now we're
just going to go get dressed to go for
dinner. We're going around like 7, so
got to start getting dressed for that.
For dinner, we headed to La and they
specialized in soulets. [music] For
dinner, we got this mushroom spinach
sule. And then the desserts were
honestly so so good. They actually had
gluten-free options. So, we got this one
pistachio and chocolate sule. So, so, so
good. And then the other one we got was
almond and caramel. [music] Definitely
recommend. So good. And then we headed
back and then I had a peppermint tea
when I got back.
I was up pretty late working on one of
my assignments. And so now I'm finally
going to go to bed. So I'll see you all
tomorrow morning. Bye.
Today we are going to Muse de laerie and
then I think we also want to go to the
Dior Museum. I think is putting on some
sort of museum maybe. I think it's like
maybe archive fashion like I'm not
really sure what it is but it seems
really cool. So, going to try and get
into that, but it's all sold out. So,
they sell tickets at the door, so we're
going to try and get some of those.
Right now, I'm just getting ready for
that. Okay, so here's the outfit today.
These shoes I got in London. These jeans
are Reformation bag is Marge Sherwood.
This thrifted and then this coat is my
sisters. And then this necklace, Monica
Viner, rings me. And these are from my
mom.
I genuinely loved this art gallery. My
mom said that when she lived here in the
'9s, she would always come here and
[music] just stare at the paintings for
hours because it was just such a
peaceful environment and it was never
really that busy. And I thought that
that was really cool to experience that
again with her. And then we saw the rest
of the gallery. And I [music] just love
smaller galleries because I feel like
you can really truly appreciate all the
art that is there.
Hello everyone.
Currently back from the day. We went to
the museum the laie. Did a lot of
walking around, had some lunch, and now
we're back. I could probably sleep for
15 hours at this point. Could go to bed
and I wouldn't wake up for 15 hours. But
in 45 minutes, we're going to dinner.
And then after dinner, we have this gala
and it's like 1920s themed, which is
like really cool. I'm very excited to go
to that. I bought a little dress for
that. So, that should be really fun. I
just finished a discussion post that
literally took me like 2 weeks for no
apparent reason. And I'm going to start
doing my makeup and getting ready for
dinner. So, that is what's going on.
This blanket is so warm and I just want
to sit here forever, I think.
>> [music]
>> We just got back from dinner. I've done
my makeup and done my hair. What I'm
doing for my hair is I'm doing like a
sort of like headband. I think I'm going
to do something like this.
I don't know.
Okay, so this is the dress that I'll be
wearing tonight. It actually looked like
this on both sides, but then I des
sequined the front because I was like,
this shiny is a little bit chewy. I
don't know. Is it chewy to say the word
chewy? I don't know, guys. Um, but this
is the dress I'm wearing. Gorgina. Okay,
we're going to put this on. Here's the
dress.
[music]
Okay, everyone. Let's go to the party.
I need to check out check.
>> Oh, there's a bike there.
[music]
>> Good morning. Um, didn't go to bed until
like 2:00 a.m. and had to wake up at
9:30 this morning. Trying to wake up and
get some stuff done.
I'm actually so tired,
but I'm [clears throat] excited for the
day.
Okay, my makeup is done and now I need
to pick out an outfit, which I'm a
little bit stressed about because I have
no idea what to wear. That's what I'm
wearing.
I got to go.
Okay, currently home. did a little
outfit check. I mean, did a lot of
change. I also changed rooms because my
cousin and her boyfriend are coming to
stay with us because they live in
London. So, they just took the train.
So, now my sister and I sharing a room.
Nice. And um yeah, we're headed to
Truckado right now, which is like the
view of the So, we can have a view of
the Eiffel Tower. So, we're going to go
and do that, which is exciting.
Afterwards, I decided that it [music]
was time to go vintage shopping. The
first place that I went was Bobby, and I
had seen a lot of like Tik Toks and
posts about it, so I really wanted to
check it out. [music] They had really
cute stuff, but it was a little bit more
on the expensive range. And then next, I
checked out Shea Snow Bunny, which
genuinely such beautiful stuff, but it
was all mostly [music] vintage designer.
And so, I mean, the pieces were great,
but I didn't really get anything. The
next place I checked out was Fa Vintage.
There was genuinely such a great [music]
selection. So many beautiful pieces and
it was also a little bit more affordable
than the other two. Okay, just got back
from
Eiffel Tower and then did some vintage
shopping. I went to this place called
Vintage and I got the most beautiful
jacket. Okay, it looks literally very
similar to this one, but it is so
beautiful. It is so soft and it's also a
lot longer. Look at this. She is
stunning. I'm actually obsessed with
that. Okay, let me should probably do a
try on. Like genuinely gorge. And it
also has this like this so I can just
tie it up too, which I love. I love like
that kind of vibe as well. And it also
has like buttons as well, so I can just
like button it up, which I think is
awesome. It's also just super warm.
Stunning.
It is now time to shower and nap because
I had like 6 hours of sleep last night.
I'm actually not going to shower. I'm
simply going to wash my face and take a
nap. Time for a 1-hour nap.
Out for dinner. This is what I'm
wearing.
>> [music]
>> Good morning. I was finally able to have
like a long sleep last night. It's like
11:00. It's the last day in Paris. So,
yeah. This is what I'm wearing. Just
very simple.
[music]
>> [music]
[music]
[music]
>> Okay, so it is Sunday, February 1st, and
we are now heading home. Unfortunately,
it was so fun. I actually genuinely love
Paris, so I will be back.
>> [music]
